chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-152 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 494/25 3.For hearing of main case 15-12-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. Even on the last two consecutive dates of hearing, none was in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, which reflects that the petitioner and their counsel have lost interest in pursuing this matter. Resultantly, the instant Constitutional Petition along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
